시편 4:1.content: Answer me when I call, God of my righteousness. Give me relief from my distress. Have mercy on me, and hear my prayer.

시편 4:2.content: You sons of men, how long shall my glory be turned into dishonor? Will you love vanity and seek after falsehood?

시편 4:3.content: But know that Yahweh has set apart for himself him who is godly: Yahweh will hear when I call to him.

시편 4:4.content: Stand in awe, and don’t sin. Search your own heart on your bed, and be still.

시편 4:5.content: Offer the sacrifices of righteousness. Put your trust in Yahweh.

시편 4:6.content: Many say, “Who will show us any good?” Yahweh, let the light of your face shine on us.

시편 4:7.content: You have put gladness in my heart, more than when their grain and their new wine are increased.

시편 4:8.content: In peace I will both lay myself down and sleep, for you, Yahweh alone, make me live in safety.
